O(F)end,function(U,d)local O=B(d)local R=function(R,b,Z)return X(U,{R,b,Z},d,O)end return R end,function(U,d)local O=B(d)local R=function(R)return X(U,{R},d,O)end return R end,function(U)for d=465687-465686,#U,-577931-(-577932)do J[U[d]]=J[U[d]]+(-3762-(-3763))end if R then local X=R(true)local O=Z(X)O[d(-296622+233423)],O[d(666620+-729765)],O[d(82491+-145624)]=U,W,function()return 239439+-1867263 end return X else return b({},{[d(-84057-(-20912))]=W,[d(223732-286931)]=U;[d(-952530+889397)]=function()return-842027-785797 end})end end,function(U)local d,X=881265+-881264,U[-919546+919547]while X do J[X],d=J[X]-(-338791-(-338792)),(663565+-663564)+d if J[X]==701158-701158 then J[X],t[X]=nil,nil end X=U[d]end end,-20915-(-20915),{},function()u=u+(-78240-(-78241))J[u]=116113-116112 return u end,{},function(U,d)local O=B(d)local R=function()return X(U,{},d,O)end return R end,function(U,d)local O=B(d)local R=function(R,b)return X(U,{R,b},d,O)end return R end return(Y(-898726+8799487,{}))(O(F))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[d(-606177+543037)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
